LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-02-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING.THE COURT RULES ON DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRERS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 FOR RACE DISCRIMINATION AND CAUSE OF ACTION 9 FOR FAILURE TO PREVENT DISCRIMINATION ARE OVERRULED. THE DEMURRERS TO PLAINTIFF'S OTHER DISCRIMINATION CLAIMS BASED ON AGE (CLAIM 3), SEX (CLAIM 5), NATIONAL ORIGIN (CLAIM 7), AND ASSOCIATION (CLAIM 12) ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DEMURRERS TO THE TENTH AND ELEVENTH CLAIMS FOR RETALIATION ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DEMURRERS TO THE HARASSMENT CLAIMS (CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 4, 6, 8) ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RODERICK P. BUSHNELL, Esq. of Law Office of Roderick P. Bushnell (Tel: 415-217-3803) for plaintiff;
Attys. EUGENE B. ELLIOT, Esq. and COREY WILSON, Esq. of Bertrand, Fox, Elliot, Osman & Wenzel (Tel: 415-353-0999) for defendant San Francisco Unified School District.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT's Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Parties are to submit a proposed order to the Court tracking verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Kathryn Llloyd, CSR No. 5955, Email: kathil58@gmail.com, Tel: 925-548-9114 (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Mar-26-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-18-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Court rules on Defendant San Francisco Unified School District's demurrer to plaintiff's Amended Complaint as follows:

The demurrers to cause of action 1 for race discrimination and cause of action 9 for failure to prevent discrimination are overruled.

The demurrers to plaintiff's other discrimination claims based on age (claim 3), sex (claim 5), national origin (claim 7), and association (claim 12) are sustained without leave to amend.

The demurrers to the tenth and eleventh claims for retaliation are sustained without leave to amend.

The demurrers to the harassment claims (causes of action 2, 4, 6, 8) are sustained without leave to amend.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
